title: stigmaphyllon grandifolium
intro: Stigmaphyllon grandifolium, also known as the Large Leaf Calabash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stigmaphyllon grandifolium include treating skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as acting as an antiviral agent. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat various health conditions.
